title: Steam Achievement Sound replaces Advancements
description: Replaces Advancement's Sound with Steam's Achievement Sound
body:
## About Me
- This RP replaces Minecraft's Advancements Sound Effect with the [Steam's](https://store.steampowered.com/) Achievement Sound Effect.
- This is a **SOUND-ONLY** Resourcepack!
- **Feel Free to use** this Resourcepack or it's contents **in your own Creations**.
- Sound Owned by Valve™ Corporation.
- Feel free to include this resourcepack in modpacks.
